audience: B2B SaaS founders & heads of growth
pain: low demo-booking rate from cold outbound
offer: a 3-touch cold email system that books 10-20 demos/month

sequence.body: Hi {{first_name}}, saw {trigger}. Quick q - are you currently using anything for {pain}? If it's on the roadmap this quarter, happy to share how similar {audience} are solving it. {{sig}}
Hi {{first_name}}, following up with a concrete example: we helped a {audience_company} go from 0 to 14 demos/mo in 6 weeks using {offer}. Worth a 15-min look? {{sig}}
Hi {{first_name}}, I'll assume timing isn't right and stop here. If {pain} ever becomes a priority, just reply 'later' and I'll send the playbook. {{sig}}

n8n_workflow.name: cold-email-outreach
n8n_workflow.note: Replace enrich + send nodes with client's real list & domain.
